mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.reporter_id AS reporter_id, m.nickname AS reporter_nickname, r.target_type AS target_type, r.target_id AS target_id, r.reason, r.detail, r.status, r.resolved_at AS resolved_at, r.created_datetime AS created_datetime FROM tbl_report r JOIN tbl_member m ON r.reporter_id = m.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_report SET status = #{status}, resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RESOLVED' THEN now() ELSE resolved_at END, updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{id}
